description: Blending plush two-tone leather with high top styling, these Timerband boots are designed for comfort under extreme conditions. The high top styling with stitch detail is a sartorial reference to the spirit of the adventurous. Wear these with form fitting denims and a dark formal shirt.UpperHigh-top leather upper with strategically placed overlay at the heelCentral lace ups with metal eyeletsPadded tonguePadded insole for in-step comfortRemovable sockliner to accommodate an orthoticMidsoleRubber midsole for cushioned comfortOutsoleTPU outsole with geometric lugs for grip and traction and a stacked  heelshoe careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dustDo not store in direct sunlight
